role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained neutral.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Japan. The agents provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence, particularly regarding the specific utility pole design and the Prunus mume tree. The tournament logic correctly prioritized the meta/regulatory evidence to distinguish Japan from South Korea.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of the valley, mountains, and dirt road match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: The flowering tree is clearly visible and correctly identified as a Prunus species.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: The concrete utility pole is the dominant infrastructure feature and was correctly described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: The synthesis of pole and housing styles aligns with the visual evidence.
